summary: Rebound aerc's compose::review y key to native ':send -a flat<Enter>' archive-on-reply and removed the superseded uncommitted [hooks] mail-sent draft; created modules/home/services/mail-sync-timer.nix (systemd.user oneshot service+timer running 'mail-sync both' every 15 minutes) and wired it into modules/home/default.nix; wired [gmail] check-mail/check-mail-cmd/check-mail-timeout in aerc.nix's accounts.conf, fixing the broken 'u' keybind. home-manager build --flake .#benjamin exits 0, verified against store outputs. Live end-to-end verification deferred to a manual user checklist in the implementation summary.

artifacts.summary: Rebound compose::review.y to ':send -a flat<Enter>'; deleted the draft [hooks] mail-sent block; added [gmail] check-mail/check-mail-cmd/check-mail-timeout
New oneshot systemd.user service + timer running 'mail-sync both' every 15 minutes, modeled on cache-cleanup.nix
Added ./services/mail-sync-timer.nix to the Service modules imports
Implementation summary with build verification evidence and the manual user end-to-end checklist

completion_data.completion_summary: Implemented native archive-on-reply (aerc compose::review y -> ':send -a flat') and a periodic systemd.user mail-sync-timer (every 15 min, mail-sync both), plus [gmail] check-mail wiring that also fixes the broken u keybind; removed the superseded draft [hooks] mail-sent block; home-manager build --flake .#benjamin verified green.

next_steps: User: home-manager switch --flake .#benjamin, then follow the manual verification checklist in the implementation summary (reply-archive, non-reply non-archive, sync-to-Gmail-web, timer health).
